content.text: I mean -- it's not going to go badly, I just need to be prepared. But if it did... I mean my boss would be disappointed, obviously. And the team is already kind of watching me because it's a new role, so. But that's just -- that's motivation, right? That's why I'm working hard. It's fine. Can we just -- can you help me figure out the Thursday thing? Like what I actually need to have ready?
